'''Hass Sonax''' was a [[Sluissi]] [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] in the employ of [[Cecil Noone]] around [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. A [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]], she used a [[BioTech Industries/Legends|BioTech Industries]] [[Borg Construct Aj^6]] cyborg headband in her work. Personal experience led her to despise [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]].

==Biography==
The daughter of dockworkers, Sonax was one of six siblings. She and her five sisters worked twelve hour shifts at the [[Sluis Van Shipyards]]. When the opportunity arose for two temporary maintenance technicians onboard a Imperial Star Destroyer, Hass and her sister Resh signed on. However, she and her sister were treated very badly. After a blown fusion coil caused a thirty-six hour delay, the captain of the warship came to the tech room and executed Resh as punishment. This caused Hass to jump ship when it arrived in the [[Roon system/Legends|Roon system]].<ref name="AJ15" />

==Personality and traits==
Sonax's personality was irritable and withdrawn, due to the combination of the trauma from her sister's death and the cyborg implant she had installed.<ref name="AJ15" />

==Equipment==
Sonax had a [[BioTech Industries/Legends|BioTech Industries]] [[Borg Construct Aj^6]] cyborg headband that she received while working for an accountant on [[Kelrodo-Ai/Legends|Kelrodo-Ai]].<ref name="AJ15" />
